description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a combination of angular and rectangular forms, creating a dynamic and visually interesting structure. The exterior is primarily finished in dark materials, with large glass panels and windows that allow for ample natural light and views. The roofline is varied, with both gable and flat sections, and the building is divided into two main volumes connected by a central glass corridor. The property includes a partially enclosed courtyard or patio area, defined by a low wall and visible from multiple sides. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more regularly spaced. The main entryway is set back and partially sheltered, featuring a simple door and a minimalistic approach without ornate detailing.
description: A modern house with dark exterior finishes, large glass windows, and a mix of gable and flat roofs. The structure is divided into two main volumes connected by a glass corridor and features an enclosed courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, gable roof, and the low wall enclosing the courtyard.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the glass corridor, flat roof section, and the open courtyard area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long facade, large windows, and the connection between the two main building volumes.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the back of the house, the gable roof, and the continuation of the courtyard wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a simple door, partially sheltered and set back, no ornate detailing
